title: Question for Reichu
wikitext:
[]: Question for Reichu             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Wed Nov 08, 2006 11:31 pm Is there any chance that you'd take on the daring project of making an accurate/literal translation of EoE? I'm personally sick of not getting all of what they're saying due to half assed translations. Please don't kill me I know the CI wasn't something you enjoyed it's just you seem to have translated things the rest of us are still clueless about.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Wed Nov 08, 2006 11:36 pm Sounds like a good idea. On the other hand, asking just because you don't like not understanding the dialogue (a humorous assessment if accurate) at least somewhat merits the following response: LEARN Japanese, YOU LAZY BUTT.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Nov 09, 2006 12:44 am But I'm a lazy butt ! On the plus side she wouldn't have people asking what does such and such mean anymore.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Nov 09, 2006 9:33 am Provided that the commentary project gets that far, it will be done eventually. Don't forget that there is also a fairly literal translation out there by Bochan Bird, you can find it on Eva Otaku. Also, I'm hoping that the upcoming renewal-version release of EoE by Manga Entertainment includes an updated subtitle track. That would be awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Nov 09, 2006 9:40 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Provided that the commentary project gets that far, it will be done eventually.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Nov 09, 2006 11:28 am Hexon.Arq wrote: LEARN Japanese, YOU LAZY BUTT.

Please don't kill me I know the CI wasn't something you enjoyed it's just you seem to have translated things the rest of us are still clueless about.
